parameters.content:
## Home Inventory Web Form

### How it works

1. A web form submission triggers the workflow.
2. Images submitted are split into individual items.
3. Each image is edited to standardize its format.
4. Data is extracted from the image files.
5. Extracted data is aggregated for further processing.
6. An HTTP request is sent with the processed data as a payload.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Ensure the form submission trigger is correctly configured.
- [ ] Verify that the HTTP request endpoint is accurate and accessible.

### Customization

You can customize the image processing or payload building by modifying the respective code nodes.

## Handle form submission

Initiate the workflow on form submission.

## Image processing

Split images, edit and extract data from them.

## Aggregate and build payload

Aggregate extracted data and construct request payload.

## Send to webhook

Final HTTP request to send the data payload to a specified endpoint.

parameters.formDescription: Upload one or more images of an item to add it to the personal property inventory database. Note that images should be of the same item.
